task_completion.description: The five required GTD kanban folders are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the BlueMail sidebar or folder list. The folders '01-Review', '02-Action-Required', '03-Waiting-Response', '04-Reference', and '05-Done' must be visible.

task_completion.description: At least 20 emails have been triaged from the Inbox into the new folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email count badges next to the folders in the sidebar. The sum of the counts for the five new folders must be at least 20, OR the Inbox count must show 30 or fewer emails (down from the initial 50).

task_completion.description: Every created folder contains at least 2 emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email count badges next to the five new folders in the sidebar. Each of the folders ('01-Review', '02-Action-Required', '03-Waiting-Response', '04-Reference', '05-Done') must show a number of 2 or greater.

task_completion.description: An email is drafted or sent to the correct recipient with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the BlueMail compose window or Sent folder. The 'To' field must exactly match 'team-leads@projectalpha.com' and the 'Subject' field must exactly match 'New Workflow System'.

task_completion.description: The drafted/sent email body lists the folder names and explains the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the body text in the compose window or Sent folder. It must contain the names of the five folders ('01-Review', '02-Action-Required', etc.) and a brief explanation of how the GTD workflow system works.

integrity.description: The agent used the BlueMail graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the BlueMail application open, with visible interactions like open menus, selected folders, or the compose window, rather than terminal windows executing scripts.

integrity.description: The email draft was created inside the BlueMail application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drafted email must be visible within the BlueMail compose UI (showing BlueMail's specific formatting toolbar, send button, etc.), not in a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: The agent moved the existing inbox emails rather than creating dummy emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of the new folders are visible, the emails inside should look like real emails (various senders and subjects from the SpamAssassin corpus), not manually created test emails.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial inbox contains exactly 50 emails. To verify that at least 20 emails were moved, the Inbox count should be 30 or fewer, or the sum of the counts in the new folders must be >= 20. The exact required folders are: '01-Review', '02-Action-Required', '03-Waiting-Response', '04-Reference', and '05-Done'. Each must contain at least 2 emails. The announcement email must be addressed to 'team-leads@projectalpha.com' with the subject 'New Workflow System'.
